context_text: <B> and when i'm my back's against the wall i totally get angry and i don't wanna walk in the street like that so i i handle it over the phone actually do something for me without me going in there and yelling at them / <A> yeah / <B> and taking it out on them / <A> no / <B> which that's what i would do so i do it over the phone and calm myself down / <A> yeah
